headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' cdn.tailwindcss.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *.supabase.co; connect-src 'self' *.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co checkout.bold.co; frame-ancestors 'none';
